message:
feat: add robot mode orchestrator for multi-agent sessions without Agent Mail

Implements `session robot` command that runs full Brenner Protocol sessions
using Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI as subprocesses. Each round
builds role-specific prompts from the current artifact state, invokes all
three agents (parallel by default, --sequential available), parses deltas,
merges into the shared artifact, and lints. Sessions converge when kill-rate
exceeds add-rate or --max-rounds is reached.

Inspired by PR #6 from @csells — independently implemented.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
